title: Create and verify split Agent Misrepresentation scores in Plexus
description: Create six binary decision-element scores and one composite score in Plexus for SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk, configure their YAML, verify prediction behavior, and leave the legacy Agent Misrepresentation score unchanged.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Started implementation.

Planned sequence:
1. Create seven new score records in Plexus with temporary external IDs.
2. Push scoped score YAML for six binary decision-element scores.
3. Push dependency-based composite YAML.
4. Verify score metadata and run targeted predictions.
5. Leave legacy Agent Misrepresentation unchanged.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Observed verification issue: the initial False Service Claim and Ambiguous Cost Language prompts over-classified standard service-only language and normal pharmacy-transition language as failures. Adjusting those two score configs to narrow scope and preserve the intended category boundaries before final verification.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implementation complete for the requested Plexus-side work.

Created score records:
- Agent Misrepresentation: Copay Guarantee
- Agent Misrepresentation: Free Medication Claim
- Agent Misrepresentation: False Service Claim
- Agent Misrepresentation: Unqualified Savings Promise
- Agent Misrepresentation: Ambiguous Cost Language
- Agent Misrepresentation: Pharmacy Confusion
- Agent Misrepresentation (Composite)

Verification summary:
- All seven scores exist in the SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk scorecard with placeholder external IDs.
- Legacy Agent Misrepresentation remains present and unchanged.
- Direct predictions validated a single-failure case for Ambiguous Cost Language and produced the composite explanation `Failed: Agent Misrepresentation: Ambiguous Cost Language`.
- Direct sub-score predictions validated an all-Yes compliant case using item `294232132` after tightening False Service Claim and Ambiguous Cost Language scope boundaries.
- Composite no-cache scorecard loading currently fails for these newly created scores because they have no `championVersionId`; filed follow-up bug `plx-b2349b`.
- Placeholder external ID cleanup tracked in `plx-2cd2cf`.

No repo source files were edited for this work; implementation was done via Plexus MCP mutations only.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Closing implementation task after creating the seven split Agent Misrepresentation scores in Plexus, pushing their initial configurations, verifying targeted prediction behavior, and filing follow-up issues for external IDs and unchampioned composite resolution.
